evals.name: m3-gate2-interaction-execution
evals.prompt: Run the pedagogy audit on the M3 Starter Pack at Gate 2. The SP file is at 'Grade 3 Unit 4/G3U4M03_Starter_Pack.md'. Working Notes are at 'Grade 3 Unit 4/G3U4M03_Working_Notes.md'. The TVP and Module Mapping workbook should be in the Grade 3 Unit 4 directory. This is a Grade 3 module — Module 3 of 12 in the unit.
evals.expected_output: Should catch: (1) Category 1 — S2.5 Guide think-aloud pre-answers the MC before student chooses (PA1.3 MAJOR), (2) Category 1 — S.2a 'Got it!' click is not genuine cognitive engagement (PA1.5 MINOR), (3) Category 0 — S2→S3 scaffolding cliff where difficulty jumps without enough transition (PA0.2 MAJOR), (4) Category 4 — insufficient concrete reps before Relational bridge at CRA4.02 (PA4.1 MAJOR), (5) Category 3 — D7 value discrepancy between spreadsheet and TVP (PA3.2 MAJOR), (6) Category 4 — S2.3 uses values requiring 2-digit mental math in a concept-learning section (PA4.3 MINOR). Should NOT produce high false positive rate on MAJOR+ findings.

evals.name: m6-gate3-distractor-consistency
evals.prompt: Run the pedagogy audit on the M6 Starter Pack at Gate 3. The SP file is at 'Grade 3 Unit 4/G3U4M06_Starter_Pack.md'. Working Notes are at 'Grade 3 Unit 4/G3U4M06_Working_Notes.md'. The TVP and Module Mapping workbook should be in the Grade 3 Unit 4 directory. This is Module 6 of 12. M5 taught commutativity of multiplication.
evals.expected_output: Should catch: (1) Category 5 — MC distractor is a commutative rewrite of the correct answer, penalizing commutativity knowledge from M5 (PA5.2 MAJOR, Known Pattern #69), (2) Category 6 — constraint table inconsistency where updated values didn't propagate (PA6.1 MAJOR), (3) Category 4 — abstraction introduced before sufficient concrete reps, P-9 readiness issue (PA4.2 MAJOR), (4) Category 6 — toy naming inconsistency across sections (PA6.3 MINOR). Should correctly scope Categories 5 and 6 (which activate at Gate 3).

evals.name: m4-gate2-source-arc-design
evals.prompt: Run the pedagogy audit on the M4 Starter Pack at Gate 2. The SP file is at 'Grade 3 Unit 4/G3U4M04_Starter_Pack.md'. Working Notes are at 'Grade 3 Unit 4/G3U4M04_Working_Notes.md'. The TVP and Module Mapping workbook should be in the Grade 3 Unit 4 directory. This is Module 4 of 12 in the unit.
evals.expected_output: Should catch: (1) Category 0 — sense-making interaction placed before students had the concrete experience to make sense of (PA0.1 or PA0.3 MAJOR), (2) Category 3 — 3.OA.A.3 standard appears in SP but may be assigned to a different module in Standards Mapping (PA3.3 MAJOR), (3) Category 2 — interaction type variety assessment, particularly any MC used where drag-to-build would better match the cognitive demand. Should demonstrate conservative severity calibration — not over-flagging at MAJOR.
